response.justification: Strong full-stack candidate with 13+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Recent roles at re:cinq and Optilyz align directly with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and include AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators) which matches a key required skill. Demonstrates engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), polyglot proficiency, and architecture experience. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions, limited Kotlin/Java depth in recent roles, and a current career gap, but these are minor relative to the overall fit.
strengths: Direct AI-agent/MCP experience plus modern TypeScript/Node/React stack from recent roles
13+ years across full stack, polyglot (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), strong craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Architecture and scale experience: micro-services handling millions of requests/sec, AWS CDK, Kubernetes, MongoDB
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack
Currently on a career gap since October 2025; short tenure (6 months) at most recent role
Kotlin specifically not listed; Java experience is older and not recent
